title: Johns Enhanced (Alacrity Addon)
description: Clean and beautiful additions to Alacrity
body:
# Johns Enhanced Alacrity Addon

**This pack is a large feature rich overhaul for Alacrity.**
Alacrity is easily one of the best resourcepacks out there. I have created lots of unique and interesting models over the years that I have never released, I decided to remake some of them as an addon. The focus of this pack is to push the details or Alacrity, add more interesting textures and overhaul the models.

Requirements/Recommendations
Alacrity is required to use this pack.

**Mods (Required)**
_**Please just download the fabulously optimised 1.21 mod pack (Functions out of the box)**_

- Fabric (Optifine no longer recommended)
- EMF (For CEM models) Entity Model Features
- ETF (For CEM models) Entity Texture Features
- Continuity (Connected Textures)
- Polytone (For custom biome colours)
- CIT Respawn (for CIT features)

This pack is additionally designed around the use of shaders. Some blocks will not function correctly without them

For optimal results please use Complementary shaders and set to LabPBR

- Iris (For shaders) Iris Shader Mod
- Complementary Shader
- Euphoria Patch (Additional shader features)

This pack adds support for fresh animations and features some modified animations

**custom mob animations from FreshLX ([Fresh animations pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations))**

Enjoy.
 
# **Current features:**


<details>
